About

This site is a place to document ongoing research, software projects, technical writing, and personal exploration.

My work sits at the intersection of systems engineering, infrastructure, open-source tooling, and applied research. I enjoy building durable, practical systems that balance performance, simplicity, and long-term maintainability.

Outside of technical work, I spend a significant amount of time in mountain environments — hiking, skiing, paragliding, and supporting small-scale ecological restoration and rewilding projects.

© 2026 John Weatherall
